headline: Boston Scientific announces results for first quarter 2026
summary: Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) generated net sales of $5.203 billion during the first quarter of 2026, growing 11.6 percent on a reported basis and 9.4 percent on an operational1 and organic2 basis, all compared to the prior year period. The company reported GAAP net income attributable to Boston Scientific common stockholders of $1.341 billion or $0.90 per share (EPS), compared to $674 million or $0.45 per share a year ago, and achieved adjusted3 EPS of $0.80 for the period, compared
